description.en: Retrieve the balance of a specific position (shares) for a user in a prediction market from the Conditional Token Framework.
description.de: Rufe den Saldo einer bestimmten Position (Anteile) für einen Benutzer in einem Prognosemarkt vom Conditional Token Framework ab.
description.es: Retrieve the balance of a specific position (shares) for a user in a prediction market from the Conditional Token Framework.
description.fr: Retrieve the balance of a specific position (shares) for a user in a prediction market from the Conditional Token Framework.
description.ro: Retrieve the balance of a specific position (shares) for a user in a prediction market from the Conditional Token Framework.
description.it: Retrieve the balance of a specific position (shares) for a user in a prediction market from the Conditional Token Framework.

actions.abi: function balanceOf(address account, uint256 id) external view returns (uint256)

description.en: The wallet address to check the balance for.
description.de: Die Wallet-Adresse, für die der Saldo überprüft werden soll.
description.es: The wallet address to check the balance for.
description.fr: The wallet address to check the balance for.
description.ro: The wallet address to check the balance for.
description.it: The wallet address to check the balance for.

description.en: The position ID (uint256) representing the specific market position.
description.de: Die Positions-ID (uint256), die die spezifische Marktposition darstellt.
description.es: The position ID (uint256) representing the specific market position.
description.fr: The position ID (uint256) representing the specific market position.
description.ro: The position ID (uint256) representing the specific market position.
description.it: The position ID (uint256) representing the specific market position.
